name: Can I get damages if partially my fault for telling my NY lawyer to use Google AI Overview?
description: Yes, reduced by your fault % in NY comparative negligence.[2]

mainEntity.name: Can I get damages if partially my fault for telling my NY lawyer to use Google AI Overview?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, reduced by your fault % in NY comparative negligence.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, under comparative negligence, damages reduce by your fault percentage if you directed unverified AI use, but lawyer still liable for breach. NY follows pure comparative fault.[2] Factors: proof of your instructions vs. duty to verify. Courts prioritize lawyer diligence. Argue shared responsibility in settlement.
